prompt: Order these events from earliest to latest

events.title: Rome founded
events.fact: -753 BC — legendary founding by Romulus and Remus

events.title: Battle of Gaugamela
events.fact: -331 BC — Alexander the Great defeats Darius III of Persia

events.title: Qin Dynasty unifies China
events.fact: -221 BC — Qin Shi Huang becomes first Emperor

events.title: Julius Caesar assassinated
events.fact: -44 BC — stabbed by senators on the Ides of March

events.title: Pompeii destroyed
events.fact: 79 AD — eruption of Mount Vesuvius buries the city

events.title: Fall of Western Rome
events.fact: 476 AD — Romulus Augustulus deposed by Odoacer
